fields.name: applicationId
fields.description: Unique identifier for the payment holiday application

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: Date and time when the application was submitted

fields.name: department
fields.description: Routing information identifying the originating and destination departments

children.name: source
children.description: Department that originated the payment holiday application

children.name: destination
children.description: Department responsible for reviewing and processing the application

fields.name: customer
fields.description: Customer details associated with the payment holiday application

children.name: customerId
children.description: Unique identifier for the customer

children.name: name
children.description: Full name of the customer

children.name: email
children.description: Email address of the customer

children.name: phone
children.description: Telephone number of the customer

fields.name: account
fields.description: Details of the account for which the payment holiday is requested

children.name: accountNumber
children.description: Unique identifier for the account

children.name: accountType
children.description: Classification of the account product

children.name: loanAmount
children.description: Original or total loan amount for the account

children.name: currency
children.description: Currency code for all monetary amounts on the account

children.name: currentBalance
children.description: Outstanding balance remaining on the account

fields.name: paymentHolidayRequest
fields.description: Details of the requested payment holiday period and terms

children.name: requestedMonths
children.description: Number of months for which payment holiday is requested

children.name: startDate
children.description: First date of the requested payment holiday period

children.name: endDate
children.description: Last date of the requested payment holiday period

children.name: reason
children.description: Customer-provided reason for requesting the payment holiday

children.name: monthlyPayment
children.description: Regular monthly payment amount that would be suspended during the holiday

fields.name: applicationStatus
fields.description: Current processing status of the payment holiday application

fields.name: requestedBy
fields.description: Details of the employee who submitted the application on behalf of the customer

children.name: employeeId
children.description: Unique identifier for the employee who submitted the application

children.name: name
children.description: Full name of the employee who submitted the application

children.name: role
children.description: Job title or role of the employee who submitted the application

fields.name: additionalNotes
fields.description: Free-text notes providing context or assessment of the application, such as customer history or payment record

fields.name: supportingDocuments
fields.description: List of document types or identifiers submitted in support of the payment holiday application

children.name: document
children.description: Type or identifier of a supporting document
